Damon: #HongKong leader #CarrieLam presser’s backdrop says it all
1984 anyone?

Daniel: Carrie Lam proves that she has the talent to make things even worse for today - even before she speaks.

Alex: Of course there won't be anything good coming out from a #CarrieLam presser. For a start, this is the backdrop, "The Truth About Hong Kong". Brace yourselves.

Yvonne:After a series of news today involving the Education Bureau, the IPCC and the Legco, here's the backdrop of the Chief Executive #CarrieLam press conf which is taking place in 15 mins....

Galileo:I would like to give a big cheer to Carrie Lam - wrapping such information exploded Friday (Riot case judgement, IPCC report on Police action, Edu Bureau DQ-ing DSE History Paper Q, more #COVID19 case) as “The Truth About #HongKong”. Photo via Internet #HongKongProtests #antiELAB

Rachel: Instead of the usual plain backgrounds, Chief Executive Carrie Lam has opted for a collage of #HongKongProtests images for her press conference where she is responding to police watchdog's report released today. "The Truth About Hong Kong", it reads.

統一戰線 推上國際 百國聯軍

真相？法治？

依家林奠開記招講「真理部報告」，個backdrop叫做「香港的真相」，我哋就幫佢放返啲真相上去先。大家有冇其他作品呢？

註：真理部為《1984》中一部門，主要負責根據現實和宣傳需要，為極權改寫歷史文獻，報紙，和文學著作。

圖片來源：Now 新聞截圖／大紀元／立場新聞／網上圖片

#跪求高汁作品
#香港的真相
